# Let's open the file text_to_analyse.txt and print it with indices perhaps
paths = ["/mnt/data/text_to_analyse.txt", "/mnt/data/file-8UE6Dr9G4nVadD8KSyiu3H-text_to_analyse.txt"]
content = None
for p in paths:
    try:
        with open(p, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
            content = f.read()
            path_used = p
            break
    except FileNotFoundError as e:
        pass

path_used, content[:500] if content else "NOT FOUND", len(content) if content else None

import re, json, textwrap

raw = content

# find segments marked by aya_start / aya_end and hadith_start / hadith_end
aya_spans = []
for m in re.finditer(r"\(aya_start\)(.*?)\(aya_end\)", raw, flags=re.DOTALL):
    aya_spans.append((m.start(1), m.end(1), m.group(1)))

hadith_spans = []
for m in re.finditer(r"\(hadith_start\)(.*?)\(hadith_end\)", raw, flags=re.DOTALL):
    hadith_spans.append((m.start(1), m.end(1), m.group(1)))

aya_spans, hadith_spans

# find all text inside Arabic double parentheses ((...))
dbl = [(m.start(1), m.end(1), m.group(1)) for m in re.finditer(r"[\(（]?\(\((.*?)\)\)", raw, flags=re.DOTALL)]
dbl

def context(s, start, end, w=80):
    st = max(0, start-w)
    ed = min(len(raw), end+w)
    return raw[st:ed]

for start, end, txt in dbl:
    print("Segment:", txt)
    print("Context around:", context(raw, start, end, 80))
    print("---")

# find occurrences of the phrase "أنت آدم الذي أغويت الناس وأخرجتهم من الجنة؟"
phr = "أنت آدم الذي أغويت الناس وأخرجتهم من الجنة؟"
for m in re.finditer(re.escape(phr), raw):
    st, ed = m.start(), m.end()
    print(st, ed)
    print(raw[max(0, st-80):min(len(raw), ed+80)])
    print("---")

for m in re.finditer("وفي الحديث الصحيح", raw):
    print(m.start(), m.group(0))

ayah4 = "فَقَالَ رَبِّ إِنَّ ابْنِي مِنْ أَهْلِي وَإِنَّ وَعْدَكَ الْحَقُّ وَأَنْتَ أَحْكَمُ الْحَاكِمِينَ"
for m in re.finditer(re.escape(ayah4), raw):
    print(m.start(), m.end())
    print(raw[max(0, m.start()-40):min(len(raw), m.end()+40)])

# find all things inside parentheses () that could be ayah/hadith; 
# We'll list parentheses pairs and their content
paren = [(m.start(1), m.end(1), m.group(1)) for m in re.finditer(r"\(([^()]*)\)", raw)]
len(paren)

for st, ed, txt in paren:
    print(st, ed, txt)

phrase_khidr = "ما علمي وما علمك إلى كما نقص هذا العصفور من البحر"
for m in re.finditer(re.escape(phrase_khidr), raw):
    print(m.start(), m.end())
    print(raw[m.start()-10:m.end()+10])

# Build list of citations
citations = []

# A) main ayah 1
citations.append({
    "start": aya_spans[0][0],
    "end": aya_spans[0][1],
    "text": aya_spans[0][2],
    "type": "Aya"
})

# B) main hadith
citations.append({
    "start": hadith_spans[0][0],
    "end": hadith_spans[0][1],
    "text": hadith_spans[0][2],
    "type": "Hadeeth"
})

# C) main ayah 2
citations.append({
    "start": aya_spans[1][0],
    "end": aya_spans[1][1],
    "text": aya_spans[1][2],
    "type": "Aya"
})

# D) hadith quotes in references
# First bracket
candidates = [
    (1657, 1700, "أنت آدم الذي أغويت الناس وأخرجتهم من الجنة؟", "Hadeeth"),
    (1725, 1815, "أنت آدم أبو البشر، خلقك الله بيده، وأسجد لك ملائكته، ثم تخرج الناس من الجنة تأكل من الشجرة", "Hadeeth"),
    (2037, 2080, "أنت آدم الذي أغويت الناس وأخرجتهم من الجنة؟", "Hadeeth"),
    (2094, 2130, "أنت موسى الذي أعطاه الله علم كل شيء؟", "Hadeeth"),
    (2150, 2180, "أنت موسى الذي أعطاه علم كل شيء", "Hadeeth"),
    (2221, 2270, "ما علمي وما علمك إلى كما نقص هذا العصفور من البحر", "Hadeeth"),
    (3331, 3428, "فَقَالَ رَبِّ إِنَّ ابْنِي مِنْ أَهْلِي وَإِنَّ وَعْدَكَ الْحَقُّ وَأَنْتَ أَحْكَمُ الْحَاكِمِينَ", "Aya"),
]
# Validate each
errs = []
for st, ed, txt, typ in candidates:
    if raw[st:ed] != txt:
        errs.append((st, ed, txt, raw[st:ed]))
    else:
        citations.append({"start": st, "end": ed, "text": txt, "type": typ})

errs, len(citations)

# Re-validate each candidate with assertion and debug contexts
for i,c in enumerate(citations):
    st = c["start"]; ed = c["end"]; txt = c["text"]; typ=c["type"]
    assert raw[st:ed] == txt, f"Mismatch for {i}: expected {txt}, got {raw[st:ed]}"
    print(i, typ, st, ed, repr(txt[:20]+"..."), "\nContext:", raw[max(0, st-40):min(len(raw), ed+40)], "\n")
